resources.string: Spectrum needs camera access for video consultations with your healthcare provider. This allows you to have face-to-face telemedicine appointments from anywhere.
Camera permission is required for video consultations. Please enable it in Settings.
Spectrum needs microphone access to enable audio during your video consultations. This ensures your doctor can hear you clearly during appointments.
Microphone permission is required for audio during consultations. Please enable it in Settings.
Spectrum needs access to your photos to upload medical documents, prescriptions, and other health-related images for your medical records.
Storage permission is required to upload documents. Please enable it in Settings.
Stay informed about your appointments, messages from doctors, and important health updates. We\'ll only send notifications that matter to you.
Notifications are disabled. You may miss important appointment reminders and messages.
Spectrum uses your location to find nearby healthcare providers and clinics, making it easier to book in-person appointments.
Location permission helps find nearby providers. Enable it in Settings for better recommendations.
Reminders and updates for your upcoming appointments
New messages from your healthcare providers
